name: Seemanshi Verma
bio: B.Tech CSE student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with hands-on experience in building AI-driven applications and full-stack systems. Passionate about solving real-world problems using data, APIs, and scalable architectures. Actively involved in research, hackathons, and technical development.
objective: To grow as an AI/ML engineer and full-stack developer by building impactful solutions, working on real-world datasets, and contributing to innovative projects. I aim to strengthen my skills in machine learning, backend systems, and system design while preparing for top tech roles.

projects.title: JalYukti - Intelligent Water Logging Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a multi-role dashboard system for citizens, commuters, officials, and city admins to monitor water logging. Built ward-level risk maps and real-time alert systems for improved city management.

projects.title: FarmZyy - AI-Based Agricultural Advisory Platform
projects.description: Built REST APIs using FastAPI for crop, pest, and yield prediction. Developed ML models using XGBoost and integrated Firebase, weather APIs, and market data for real-time agricultural insights.

achievements.title: Research Work
achievements.description: Conducted a research paper on Astronomy under the guidance of Dr. Yukti Mutreja.

certificates.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: B.Tech CSE student specializing in AI & ML with experience in frontend development, machine learning models, and API integrations. Passionate about building impactful real-world solutions and continuously improving technical skills.

sections.title: Education
sections.content:
